_comment: alik job catalog (Phase 7). Manually curated, not scraped — this file is the source of truth; add a job by adding an object here, no code change. MATCHING: required_fact_values is OR-semantics — a job's fact requirement is satisfied when ANY listed key has a CURRENT fact (valid_until IS NULL) whose content CONTAINS one of the listed substrings (case-insensitive). required_facts (key presence) and required_traits are also hard gates; any specified-and-failing gate scores the job 0.0. requires_any_confirmed_trait: true means 'any CONFIRMED trait with confidence >= min_confidence'. available_to_all: true is the fallback shown to everyone when nothing specific matches.

jobs.title: Rate AI responses
jobs.description: Review and rank AI responses for quality and tone. No experience needed.

jobs.title: Train AI on creative writing
jobs.description: Write and edit short creative pieces to teach an AI good prose, voice, and tone.

jobs.title: Review AI-generated code
jobs.description: Evaluate and correct AI-written code for correctness and quality.

jobs.title: Evaluate AI medical answers
jobs.description: Review AI responses to health questions for clinical accuracy and safety.

jobs.title: Rank AI answers for quality
jobs.description: Carefully compare and rank AI answers — great for detail-oriented people.
